name: CAC Score
description: Coronary artery calcification (CAC) score using Agatston scoring of CT scan(s) of coronary arteries
example_variables: MD1CAC_S: CAC SCORE IN WHOLE HEART

name: CAC Volume
description: Coronary artery calcium volume using CT scan(s) of coronary arteries
example_variables: volpm1c: MEAN: TOTAL CALCIUM VOLUME, PHANTOM-ADJUSTED
volpmfc: MEAN: TOTAL CALCIUM VOLUME, PHANTOM-ADJUSTED

name: Carotid Plaque
description: Presence or absence of carotid plaque.
example_variables: imt_anyplaque_baseline: Any presence of carotid plaque as measured by IMT at baseline visit
PLAQUE01: Plaque (with or without shadowing) in any carotid site
LMRPH141: YEAR 5 LESION MORPHOLOGY, RT SIDE

name: Carotid Stenosis
description: Extent of narrowing of the carotid artery.
example_variables: PSTEN141: YEAR 5 PERCENT STENOSIS, RT SIDE
PSTEN241: YEAR 5 PERCENT STENOSIS, LFT SIDE
PSTEN155: BL REREAD PERCENT STENOSIS, RT SIDE

name: CIMT
description: Common carotid intima-media thickness, calculated as the mean of two values: mean of multiple thickness estimates from the left far wall and from the right far wall.
example_variables: imt_mean_farwall_cca_baseline: Carotid intima-media far wall thickness at baseline visit
LOPAAV45: Average far wall width, left common carotid: optimal angle
LANAAV45: Average far wall width, left common carotid: anterior angle

name: CIMT
description: Common carotid intima-media thickness, calculated as the mean of four values: maximum of multiple thickness estimates from the left far wall, left near wall, right far wall, and right near wall.
example_variables: LOPAMX23: Maximum near wall width, left common carotid: optimal angle
LANAMX23: Maximum near wall width, left common carotid: anterior angle
LPOAMX23: Maximum near wall width, left common carotid: posterior angle

name: Angina Incident
description: An indicator of whether a subject had an angina event (that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals) during the follow-up period.

name: CABG Incident
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a coronary artery bypass graft (CABG) procedure (that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals) during the follow-up period.
example_variables: cvddate: Date of Cardiovascular Disease (CVD) Status

name: Cad Followup Start Age
description: Age of subject at the start of the follow-up period during which atherosclerosis events were reviewed and adjudicated.

name: Chd Death Definite
description: An indicator of whether the cause of death was determined by medical professionals or technicians to be "definite" coronary heart disease for subjects who died during the follow-up period.

name: Chd Death Probable
description: An indicator of whether the cause of death was determined by medical professionals or technicians to be "probable" or "definite" coronary heart disease for subjects who died during the follow-up period.

name: Coronary Angioplasty Incident
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a coronary angioplasty procedure (that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals) during the follow-up period.

name: Mi Incident
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a myocardial infarction (MI) event (that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals) during the follow-up period.

name: Pad Incident
description: An indicator of whether a subject had peripheral arterial disease (that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals) during the follow-up period.

name: Angina Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had an angina event prior to the baseline visit.

name: CABG Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a coronary artery bypass graft (CABG) procedure prior to the start of the baseline visit.
example_variables: PHEA07A: [Invasive procedures]. Have you ever had surgery on your heart, or on the arteries of your neck or legs, excluding surgery for vericose veins? Coronary bypass. Q7a
BPSSURBL: CORONARY BYPASS SURGERY AT BL

name: Coronary Angioplasty Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a coronary angioplasty procedure prior to the start of the baseline visit.
example_variables: PHEA09A: [Invasive procedures]. [Probe for type of procedure]. Angioplasty of coronary artery(ies)? Q9a
MHXA54A: Q54a. F. Invasive procedures. Ever had angioplasty of coronary arteries? [Visit 1]

name: Coronary Revascularization Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a coronary revascularization procedure prior to the start of the baseline visit. This includes angioplasty, CABG, and other coronary revascularization procedures.
example_variables: ARTERIES: Ever had coronary bypass surgery/angioplasty/or balloon dilation because arteries of the heart were blocked?

name: Mi Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a myocardial infarction (MI) prior to the start of the baseline visit.
example_variables: PREVMI05: Prevalent MI from ECG or medical history

name: Pad Prior
description: An indicator of whether a subject had peripheral arterial disease prior to the baseline visit.
example_variables: PAD02: Peripheral artery disease visit 1, definition 2 - same for both genders

name: Bmi Baseline
description: Body mass index calculated at baseline.
example_variables: BMI: Body Mass Index calculated from Height and Weight

name: Current Smoker Baseline
description: Indicates whether subject currently smokes cigarettes.
example_variables: current_smoker_baseline: Current smoking status of participant at baseline visit

name: Ever Smoker Baseline
description: Indicates whether subject ever regularly smoked cigarettes.
example_variables: EVER_SMOKED_CIGARETTES: Answer to "Have you ever smoked cigarettes?"
EverSmokedCig: Have you ever smoked cigarettes?

name: Height Baseline
description: Body height at baseline.

name: Weight Baseline
description: Body weight at baseline.

name: Basophil (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of basophils in the blood (bld).
example_variables: basophils_baseline: Basophils value at baseline visit

name: Eosinophil (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of eosinophils in the blood (bld).
example_variables: eosinophils_baseline: Eosinophils value at baseline visit

name: Hematocrit (Volume Fraction in Blood)
description: Measurement of hematocrit, the fraction of volume (vfr) of blood (bld) that is composed of red blood cells.
example_variables: hematocrit_baseline: Hematocrit value at baseline visit

name: Hemoglobin (Mass Concentration in Blood)
description: Measurement of mass per volume, or mass concentration (mcnc), of hemoglobin in the blood (bld).
example_variables: hemoglobin_baseline: Hemoglobin value at baseline visit

name: Lymphocyte (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of lymphocytes in the blood (bld).
example_variables: lymphocytes_baseline: Lymphocytes value at baseline visit

name: MCH Entmass RBC
description: Measurement of the average mass (entmass) of hemoglobin per red blood cell(rbc), known as mean corpuscular hemoglobin (MCH).

name: MCHc Mcnc RBC
description: Measurement of the mass concentration (mcnc) of hemoglobin in a given volume of packed red blood cells (rbc), known as mean corpuscular hemoglobin concentration (MCHC).
example_variables: B767: MCHC (MEAN CORPUSCULAR HEMOGLOBIN CONCENTRATION) (METPATH lab profile)
MCHC: Mean corpuscular hemoglobin concentration (sample type: whole blood)
hemoglobin_baseline: Hemoglobin value at baseline visit

name: MCV Entvol RBC
description: Measurement of the average volume (entvol) of red blood cells (rbc), known as mean corpuscular volume (MCV).
example_variables: HMTB13: Mean corpuscular volume (MCV) (to nearest whole unit). Q13

name: Monocyte (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of monocytes in the blood (bld).
example_variables: monocytes_baseline: Monocytes value at baseline visit

name: Neutrophil (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of neutrophils in the blood (bld).
example_variables: neutrophils_baseline: Neutrophils value at baseline visit

name: Platelet (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of platelets in the blood (bld).
example_variables: platelet_count_baseline: Platelet count at baseline visit

name: PMV (Volume per Entity in Blood)
description: Measurement of the mean volume (entvol) of platelets in the blood (bld), known as mean platelet volume (MPV or PMV).
example_variables: MPV: Mean platelet volume (sample type: whole blood)

name: RBC (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of red blood cells in the blood (bld).
example_variables: CBC4: Red blood cell count, Rbc

name: RDW Ratio RBC
description: Measurement of the ratio of variation in width to the mean width of the red blood cell (rbc) volume distribution curve taken at +/- 1 CV, known as red cell distribution width (RDW).
example_variables: CBC11: Red cell distribution width, Rdw
RDW: Red cell distribution width (sample type: whole blood)

name: WBC (Number Concentration in Blood)
description: Count by volume, or number concentration (ncnc), of white blood cells in the blood (bld).
example_variables: CBC3: White blood cell count, Wbc

name: Antihypertensive Meds
description: Indicator for use of antihypertensive medication at the time of blood pressure measurement.
example_variables: xbpmeds: Meds: On specified BP medication

name: Blood Pressure - Diastolic
description: Resting diastolic blood pressure from the upper arm in a clinical setting.
example_variables: SBPA14: Q14. D. First blood pressure measurement. Diastolic (first BP) [Visit 1]

name: Blood Pressure - Systolic
description: Resting systolic blood pressure from the upper arm in a clinical setting.
example_variables: SBPA13: Q13. D. First blood pressure measurement. Systolic (first BP) [Visit 1]

name: Annotated Sex
description: Subject sex, as recorded by the study.

name: Geographic Site
description: Recruitment/field center, baseline clinic, or geographic region.

name: Hispanic or Latino Ethnicity
description: Indicator of reported Hispanic or Latino ethnicity.
example_variables: H700: WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING BEST DESCRIBES YOU - ETHNICITY HISPANIC OR LATINO

name: Hispanic Subgroup
description: classification of Hispanic/Latino background for Hispanic/Latino subjects where country or region of origin information is available
example_variables: hctryo1c: COUNTRY OR REGION OF HISPANIC ORIGIN
hctryofc: COUNTRY OR REGION OF HISPANIC ORIGIN

name: Race Us
description: Reported race of participant according to the United States administrative definition of race.

name: Subcohort
description: A distinct subgroup within a study, generally indicating subjects who share similar characteristics due to study design. Subjects may belong to only one subcohort.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Cd40
description: Cluster of differentiation 40 ligand (CD40) concentration in blood.

name: CRP
description: C-reactive protein (CRP) concentration in blood.
example_variables: crp_baseline: CRP value at baseline visit

name: Eselectin
description: E-selectin concentration in blood.

name: ICAM-1
description: Intercellular adhesion molecule 1 (ICAM1) concentration in blood.

name: Il10
description: Interleukin 10 (IL10) concentration in blood.

name: Il18
description: Interleukin 18 (IL18) concentration in blood.

name: Il1 Beta
description: Interleukin 1 beta (IL1b) concentration in blood.

name: IL-6
description: Interleukin 6 (IL6) concentration in blood.

name: Isoprostane 8 Epi Pgf2A
description: Isoprostane 8-epi-prostaglandin F2 alpha (8-epi-PGF2a) concentration in urine.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Lppla2 Act
description: Activity of lipoprotein-associated phospholipase A2 (LP-PLA2), also known as platelet-activating factor acetylhydrolase, measured in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Lppla2 Mass
description: Mass of lipoprotein-associated phospholipase A2 (LP-PLA2), also known as platelet-activating factor acetylhydrolase, measured in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Mcp1
description: Monocyte chemoattractant protein-1 (MCP1), also known as C-C motif chemokine ligand 2, concentration in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Mmp9
description: Matrix metalloproteinase 9 (MMP9) concentration in blood.

name: Mpo
description: Myeloperoxidase (MPO) concentration in blood.

name: Opg
description: Osteoprotegerin (OPG) concentration in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Pselectin
description: P-selectin concentration in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Tnfa
description: Tumor necrosis factor alpha (TNFa) concentration in blood.

name: Tnfa R1
description: Tumor necrosis factor alpha receptor 1 (TNFa-R1) concentration in blood.
example_variables: tnfri1: TUMOR NECROSIS FACTOR-A SOLUBLE RECEPTORS (pg/ml)

name: Tnfr2
description: Tumor necrosis factor receptor 2 (TNFR2) concentration in blood.
example_variables: idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Fasting Lipids
description: Indicates whether participant fasted for at least eight hours prior to blood draw to measure lipids phenotypes.
example_variables: FAST0802: Fasting time of 8 hours or more

name: HDL
description: Blood mass concentration of high-density lipoprotein cholesterol
example_variables: hdl_baseline: HDL value at baseline visit

name: LDL
description: Blood mass concentration of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol

name: Lipid Lowering Medication
description: Indicates whether participant was taking any lipid-lowering medication at blood draw to measure lipids phenotypes
example_variables: meds_LIPIDS: Taking any Lipid Lowering Medication?

name: Total Cholesterol
description: Blood mass concentration of total cholesterol
example_variables: totchol_baseline: Total cholesterol value at baseline visit
TCHSIU01: Total cholesterol in SI units

name: Triglycerides
description: Blood mass concentration of triglycerides
example_variables: trigs_baseline: Triglycerides value at baseline visit
TRGSIU01: Total triglycerides In SI units

name: Sleep Duration
description: Usual amount of time slept per day.
example_variables: RSE21: F. Sleep. Q21. Hours of sleep in past month
F67SLPHR: PAST MONTH AVG SLEEPING HOURS. Q 7

name: VTE Case Status
description: An indicator of whether a subject experienced a venous thromboembolism event (VTE) that was verified by adjudication or by medical professionals.

name: VTE Followup Start Age
description: Age of subject at the start of the follow up period during which venous thromboembolism (VTE) events were reviewed and adjudicated.

name: VTE Prior History
description: An indicator of whether a subject had a venous thromboembolism (VTE) event prior to the start of the medical review process (including self-reported events).
example_variables: vtpehx01: LITE : Self-report of DVT or PE at baseline
idtype: Framingham Heart Study cohort identifier

name: Food Frequency Questionnaire
description: Food frequency questionnaire (FFQ) data: frequency and quantity of specific food items consumed over a reference period. Includes individual food items, food groups, and serving counts.
example_variables: APPLE: FFQ: FRESH APPLES OR PEARS (1)

name: Nutrient Intake
description: Computed nutrient intake values derived from dietary assessments: total calories, macronutrients (protein, fat, carbohydrates, fiber), micronutrients (vitamins, minerals), fatty acid profiles, and cholesterol intake.
example_variables: DT_KCAL: DAILY DIETARY ESTIMATES OF CALORIES

name: Dietary Supplement Use
description: Use of dietary supplements including multivitamins, individual vitamins (A, B, C, D, E), minerals (calcium, iron, zinc), fish oil, herbal supplements, and other over-the-counter nutritional supplements.
example_variables: VITCCURR: VITAMIN C MG: CURRENTLY TAKING

name: Diet Quality Score
description: Composite dietary quality indices and scores: Healthy Eating Index (HEI), DASH diet score, Mediterranean diet score, Dietary Inflammatory Index, and other summary measures of overall diet quality.
example_variables: HEI_TOTAL: Healthy Eating Index total score

name: Genetic Principal Components
description: Principal component analysis (PCA) eigenvectors computed from genome-wide genotype data to capture population structure and genetic ancestry. Typically PC1 through PC10 or PC20.
example_variables: pc5: Principal component 5: reveals a north-to-south cline within Europeans

name: Admixture Proportions
description: Ancestry proportions estimated from admixture models (e.g., ADMIXTURE, STRUCTURE) showing the fraction of an individual's genome derived from each ancestral population (African, European, East Asian, South Asian, Native American).
example_variables: AFR: Percent African calculated from ADMIXTURE algorithm
EUR: Percent European calculated from ADMIXTURE algorithm
ANCESTRY: Ancestry based on principal component analysis
